hero.subtitle: SEADON New Materials specializes in the R&D and manufacturing of high-performance waterborne acrylic and polyurethane resins, providing sustainable digital lab-grade solutions for global industrial coatings.

layout.privacy_notice: We use necessary cookies to ensure the proper functioning and security of our official website. By continuing to visit, you agree to our privacy policy.

footer.description: Seaton New Materials is a leading global provider of water-based resin solutions, committed to driving the green transformation of the chemical industry through technological innovation.
footer.subscribe_desc: Subscribe to our mailing list for the latest product news and industry updates.

products.title: Product Center
products.subtitle: Based on deep material science accumulation, Seaton provides you with comprehensive water-based solutions from basic resins to specialty functional polymers.

cta.title: Custom Development Services
cta.desc: Seaton Application R&D Center (Guangzhou Technology R&D Center) is dedicated to providing 'tailor-made' resin development and technical support based on your specific application scenarios.

hero.desc: We don't just manufacture resins; we reshape the soul of materials at the atomic scale. Through precise particle design, we provide global industry with performance that exceeds expectations.

innovation.title: Core Technology Matrix
innovation.subtitle: Based on deep material science accumulation, Seaton provides you with comprehensive water-based solutions from basic resins to specialty functional polymers.

tech1.title: Self-Matting Tech
tech1.desc: Seaton core patent, molecular-level spontaneous matting without adding matting powder.

tech2.title: High Performance PUD
tech2.desc: Excellent flexibility and wear resistance, defining new standards for leather finishing.

tech3.title: Waterborne UV
tech3.desc: Perfect combination of eco-friendliness and efficiency, instant curing, extreme hardness.

tech4.title: Anti-Fingerprint Coating
tech4.desc: Designed for metal and electronic products, long-lasting oleophobic, easy to clean.

sustainability.title: Green Chemistry
sustainability.subtitle: Driving Sustainable Growth
sustainability.desc: We are deeply aware of the chemical industry's impact on the environment. Seaton is committed to developing 100% water-based, low VOC, zero matting powder added eco-friendly resins, helping our customers achieve carbon neutrality goals while improving product performance.
sustainability.voc_desc: Complies with the world's most stringent environmental regulations.
sustainability.circular_desc: Optimizing production processes to reduce waste emissions.

rd.title: R&D Driven
rd.subtitle: Exploring Material Boundaries
rd.desc: Seaton has a 5000㎡ application R&D center in Nanxiong, Guangdong. We not only produce resins but are also committed to providing 'tailor-made' resin development and technical support based on customers' specific application scenarios.

video.title: Audiovisual Seaton
video.subtitle: Witness the Power of Innovation
video.desc: Through the corporate film, gain a deep understanding of Seaton New Materials' R&D strength, intelligent manufacturing base, and our commitment to a green future.
video.video_title: Seaton New Materials: Defining New Heights in Green Chemistry

global.title: Global Innovation Network
global.desc: Based in China, serving the world. Seaton provides immediate technical support to customers in 50+ countries and regions through its global R&D centers and sales network.

final_cta.title: Ready to Start Your Green Transformation?
final_cta.desc: Contact our technical experts for customized water-based resin solutions.

hero.title: About Seaton
hero.subtitle: New Materials
hero.desc: Guangdong Seaton New Material Technology Co., Ltd. has been focusing on the research, development, and production of water-based eco-friendly products for over a decade. It is a fine chemical new material enterprise integrating R&D, production, sales, and service.

strength.title: Solid Industrial Foundation
strength.subtitle: and Technical Strength
strength.desc: The company's production base covers an area of 37,200 square meters, with an annual production capacity of 60,000 tons. As a national high-tech enterprise, a national 'Little Giant' enterprise, and a Guangdong Provincial Doctoral Workstation, we have more than 20 international leading automated production lines and have introduced a full set of Siemens automation operating systems to ensure that every product meets high international standards.
strength.team_desc: Led by overseas high-level talents and PhDs from prestigious universities, focusing on the frontier exploration of water-based polymer materials.
strength.vision_desc: Certified by ISO9001, ISO14001, and ISO45001, products are benchmarked against world-class quality.

honors.title: Authoritative Endorsement
honors.subtitle: and Intellectual Property
honors.desc: Seaton always adheres to independent R&D and has built a deep technical barrier and intellectual property protection system through multiple national certifications.
honors.giant_desc: National 'Little Giant' enterprise certification, representing our specialization and innovation in niche fields.
honors.phd_desc: Guangdong Provincial Doctoral Workstation, gathering top scientific research forces to continuously overcome industry technical problems.
honors.patents_desc: Nearly 30 national patents have been applied for and authorized, building a deep technical moat.

manufacturing.title: Smart Manufacturing Base
manufacturing.desc: A modern production base covering 37,200㎡, equipped with 20+ automated production lines, with an annual capacity of 60,000 tons.

culture.title: Corporate Culture
culture.mission_desc: Committed to the R&D and application of water-based polymer materials, creating a green and healthy life for humanity.
culture.vision_desc: To become a leading global supplier of water-based polymer materials, leading the industry to new heights of green environmental protection.
culture.values_desc: Innovation, Quality, Service, Win-win. Customer-centric, quality-based.
culture.spirit_desc: Integrity, Pragmatism, Pioneering, Enterprising. Down-to-earth, brave to explore the frontiers of material science.

commitment.title: Our Core Commitment
commitment.desc: Seaton New Materials always adheres to the development philosophy of 'technological innovation, green environmental protection'. We not only provide standardized water-based matte resins, polyurethanes, acrylics, and UV products, but can also develop high-performance customized products according to customer needs, providing a full set of water-based solutions.

hero.title: R&D
hero.subtitle: Innovation
hero.desc: Innovation is the core driving force of Seaton New Materials. We continuously invest in R&D, committed to overcoming technical problems in the field of water-based resins and providing the industry with more advanced materials.

lab.title: Led by PhDs
lab.subtitle: High-spec Laboratory
lab.desc: Seaton New Materials has a 5,000㎡ application R&D center in Guangdong, equipped with world-leading experimental equipment. Our R&D team is led by overseas high-level talents and PhDs from prestigious universities, focusing on frontier research of water-based polymer materials, and has established deep industry-university-research cooperation with many well-known chemical colleges.
lab.team_desc: Relying on the 'Guangdong Provincial Doctoral Workstation', gathering top industry talents, focusing on breakthrough research on the underlying logic of water-based resins.
lab.center_desc: Equipped with GC-MS, GPC, DSC, laser particle size analyzer and other precision instruments to achieve full-dimensional data monitoring from raw materials to finished products.
lab.custom_desc: Based on particle design theory, through precise regulation of polymer microstructures, providing customers with 'tailor-made' resin solutions.

testing.title: Strict
testing.subtitle: Testing System
testing.desc: Seaton not only focuses on the synthesis of resins but also on their performance in final applications. We have established a full set of application simulation laboratories to ensure that every resin has undergone extreme environment tests before being launched to the market.
testing.cnas: Our laboratory management system is built with reference to CNAS standards to ensure the objectivity and authority of testing results.
testing.chemical_desc: Acid and alkali resistance, solvent resistance, alcohol wipe test
testing.aging_desc: QUV artificial aging, yellowing resistance, high temperature test
testing.mechanical_desc: Tensile strength, elongation at break, hardness test
testing.simulation_desc: Simulate real painting environment, verify final effect

philosophy.title: Application-oriented
philosophy.subtitle: Basic Research
philosophy.desc: Seaton's R&D is not limited to the laboratory. We have a deep understanding of terminal application scenarios. Through in-depth research on polymer physics, interface chemistry, and film-forming mechanisms, we solve actual production pain points for customers and promote the water-based process.

hero.title: Contact & Support
hero.desc: Professional customer service and technical team, ready to provide you with all-round support and service.

info.title: Start Your
info.subtitle: Green Materials Journey
info.desc: Whether you need customized product development or seek existing water-based resin solutions, our expert team will serve you wholeheartedly.
info.address_val: No. 1, Ping'an 3rd West Road, Nanxiong High-tech Zone, Shaoguan, Guangdong

form.name: Your Name
form.success_desc: Thank you for your inquiry. Our expert team will contact you within 24 hours.

hero.title: Business
hero.subtitle: Divisions
hero.desc: Seaton New Materials precisely meets the needs of various industries through specialized division operations, providing targeted technical support and services.

leather.title: Leather Chemicals Division
leather.desc: Provide one-stop full-range leather chemical solutions, covering the entire process flow such as finishing, fatliquoring, and retanning, helping the leather industry green upgrade.

resin.title: Waterborne Resin Division
resin.desc: Focus on resin R&D in fields such as plastics, wood, and water-based inks, quickly providing customers with high-performance, environmentally friendly one-stop solutions.

automotive.title: Automotive Interior Division
automotive.desc: Provide a series of high-end interior leather solutions for various types of cars, meeting the automotive industry's strict requirements for environmental protection, durability, and aesthetics.

uv.title: Waterborne UV Division
uv.desc: A leader in environmentally friendly water-based UV technology, products are widely used in various fields, providing excellent curing speed and surface performance.

battery.title: Power Battery Adhesive Division
battery.desc: Focus on the R&D of high-adhesion functional adhesives for battery separators, helping to improve the safety and efficiency of new energy power batteries.

custom.title: Customized Solutions
custom.desc: Provide 'tailor-made' resin development and technical support services based on customers' special application scenarios and performance requirements.

global.title: Serving Global
global.subtitle: 1000+ Industry Leaders
global.desc: Our division teams work closely with industry leaders around the world to jointly promote material technology progress and create a green future.

hero.title: Market Applications
hero.desc: Seaton New Materials' technology is widely used in multiple core industrial fields, providing excellent surface treatment and functional solutions for different industries through innovative water-based technology.

automotive.title: Automotive Industry
automotive.desc: Provide high-performance water-based coating solutions for automotive interiors, dashboards, seat leathers, and exterior parts. Meet strict weather resistance, chemical resistance, and environmental emission standards.

electronics.title: Electronics & Appliances
electronics.desc: Provide excellent touch, hardness, and protection performance for 3C electronic products, smart homes, and large appliance shells. Enhance product added value and user experience.

packaging.title: Packaging & Print
packaging.desc: Cover tobacco and alcohol packaging, food packaging, and various types of film printing. Provide water-based ink binders with high resolubility, high color development, and excellent transfer performance.

home.title: Home & Architecture
home.desc: Focus on wood furniture, flooring, and interior decoration. Provide coating systems that prevent grain raising, are highly transparent, fast-drying, and environmentally friendly, protecting home health.

leather.title: Leather & Fashion
leather.desc: Provide a full set of water-based finishing solutions for shoe materials, bags, and garment leather. Give leather a natural look, delicate feel, and excellent physical properties.

industrial.title: Industrial & Energy
industrial.desc: Dedicated to coil coating, metal anti-corrosion, power batteries, and special industrial fields. Provide surface treatment solutions with high strength, broad-spectrum adhesion, long-term anti-corrosion, and electrochemical stability.

custom.title: Industry Not Found?
custom.desc: Seaton has a strong R&D team that can provide customized water-based resin development and overall technical solutions based on your special application needs.

hero.title: Innovation Driven
hero.subtitle: Beauty of Materials
hero.desc: Seaton New Materials has always stood at the forefront of waterborne polymer science, providing more environmentally friendly and efficient surface treatment solutions for global industries through continuous R&D investment and technological breakthroughs.

philosophy.title: In the Name of Science
philosophy.subtitle: Reshaping the Future of Materials
philosophy.item1_desc: Achieve ultimate stability and breakthroughs in product performance through precise control of polymer molecular weight distribution and functional group arrangement.
philosophy.item2_desc: Deeply understand downstream application scenarios, providing full-link technical support from construction and compatibility to final performance.

self_matting.title: Waterborne Self-Matting Patent
self_matting.desc: Seaton's independently developed self-matting technology completely says goodbye to traditional matting powder addition. Through polymer molecular structure design, the coating achieves spontaneous matting, giving the surface an extremely delicate touch and excellent scratch resistance.

uv.title: Multi-functional Waterborne UV
uv.desc: Breakthrough stable synthesis of 3, 6, and 9 functional group water-based UV resins. While maintaining water-based environmental characteristics, it provides hardness, gloss, and chemical resistance comparable to or even exceeding solvent-based UV.

pud.title: Aliphatic Soft-Touch PUD
pud.desc: Specially developed for 3C electronics and automotive interiors. Simulating the delicate texture of human skin, it has excellent anti-yellowing performance and resilience, redefining the tactile dimension of high-performance coatings.

anti_fingerprint.title: Nano-Hybrid Anti-Fingerprint
anti_fingerprint.desc: Utilize nano-modification technology to reduce surface energy, making fingerprint residues inconspicuous and extremely easy to wipe. While maintaining the original color texture of metal, it provides long-term anti-corrosion protection.

center.title: Guangzhou R&D Center
center.desc: Located in Panyu, Guangzhou, the Seaton Application R&D Center has advanced synthesis laboratories, precision testing instruments, and a full set of application simulation equipment. We not only develop resins but are also committed to providing customers with 'tailor-made' overall technical solutions.
center.team_desc: Seaton brings together a team of PhDs and experts from world-renowned universities, led by high-level overseas talents, ensuring that we always maintain technological leadership in the field of polymer synthesis.

vision.title: Driving Global Green Material Revolution
vision.desc: Seaton New Materials will continue to explore the infinite possibilities of polymer science, creating a safer, more environmentally friendly, and better future for mankind through innovative water-based technology.

hero.title: News &
hero.subtitle: Insights
hero.desc: Here you can find all news about Seaton New Materials and the industries we serve. Please select news by topic.

items.no_results: No news content matching the criteria

hero.title: Green Chemistry
hero.subtitle: Guarding the Future
hero.desc: Seaton New Materials is committed to being a pioneer in green chemistry. We integrate sustainability into every stage of product R&D, production, and supply chain, using technology to protect our environment.

environmental.title: Environmental Responsibility
environmental.desc: By promoting waterborne technologies, we aim to help downstream industries reduce VOC emissions by 50% by 2030. We are also deploying photovoltaic power at our production bases to optimize our energy structure.

social.title: Social Value
social.desc: We focus on employee growth and community well-being. Through the 'Seaton Scholarship' and industry talent programs, we promote the popularization of polymer science and talent development.

governance.title: Corporate Governance
governance.desc: We adhere to transparent and compliant business principles. We have established a robust supply chain compliance assessment system to ensure every drop of raw material meets the strictest global environmental and ethical standards.

management.title: Full Lifecycle Green Management
management.desc: We focus not only on the environmental properties of our products but also on optimizing the carbon footprint throughout the lifecycle from raw material sourcing and manufacturing to packaging and transportation. By introducing bio-based raw materials and recycling processes, we are redefining the boundaries of chemical production.
management.item1_desc: All products meet the strictest international environmental standards, helping customers achieve green production.
management.item2_desc: Establish a complete wastewater treatment and resource recovery system to achieve zero pollution in the production process.
management.item3_desc: Continuously increase the proportion of bio-based raw materials in our products to reduce dependence on fossil resources.

vision.title: Building a Green Future Together
vision.desc: We invite global partners to explore sustainable material science together and contribute to protecting our planet.

automotive.overview: As the global automotive industry transitions towards green, eco-friendly, and low-VOC solutions, Seaton New Materials provides comprehensive waterborne coating solutions for automotive interiors, dashboards, and exterior components. We are committed to enhancing cabin comfort and aesthetics while ensuring material durability and safety.
challenges: Strict VOC emission standards and odor control
Extremely high requirements for high and low temperature cycle endurance
Excellent adhesion to various substrates (ABS, PC, Leather)
Outstanding scratch and chemical resistance (sunscreen, sweat, etc.)

solutions.title: Waterborne Interior Leather Coating System
solutions.desc: Using high-performance PUD resins, it gives synthetic and genuine leather a delicate touch and excellent physical properties, meeting the strict tests of automotive OEMs.

solutions.title: Tactile Coating Solutions
solutions.desc: Provides an ultimate 'skin-feel' experience for dashboards and center consoles, with excellent matting effects and anti-fingerprint properties.

benefits: Ultra-low VOC emissions, protecting in-car air quality
Long-lasting weather resistance and physical protection
Compliant with major global OEM standards

coreAdvantages.title: Self-Matting Core Technology
coreAdvantages.desc: Achieves extremely low gloss without adding matting agents, with higher film transparency and no white fog phenomenon.

coreAdvantages.title: Excellent Chemical Resistance
coreAdvantages.desc: Passes strict sunscreen, sweat, and alcohol tests, ensuring interiors stay like new.

coreAdvantages.title: Low Odor / Low VOC
coreAdvantages.desc: Specially designed for enclosed car environments, far exceeding national and European emission requirements.

electronics.overview: In the 3C electronics and smart appliance sectors, appearance texture and surface protection are core product competitiveness. Seaton's high-performance waterborne resins enhance product visual quality while providing excellent surface hardness and wear resistance.
challenges: Uniform coating on complex geometric shapes
Precise control of high-gloss and matte effects
Excellent resistance to alcohol and cosmetics
Fast curing to improve production efficiency

solutions.title: 3C Electronics Surface Coating
solutions.desc: For phone cases and laptop shells, providing high-hardness, scratch-resistant waterborne UV or two-component systems.

solutions.title: Appliance Exterior Decoration
solutions.desc: Provides rich color expression and long-term anti-corrosion protection for refrigerator and washing machine panels.

benefits: Ultimate surface flatness and gloss control
Enhancing the tech-feel of end products

coreAdvantages.title: Excellent Substrate Adhesion
coreAdvantages.desc: Outstanding adhesion to various electronic substrates like PC, ABS, and metal.

coreAdvantages.title: High Hardness and Wear Resistance
coreAdvantages.desc: Film hardness can reach 2H or more, effectively resisting scratches and wear in daily use.

coreAdvantages.title: Precise Color Reproduction
coreAdvantages.desc: High-transparency base material ensures metal powders or pigments present the truest visual effects.

packaging.overview: Seaton has deep technical accumulation in the packaging and printing field, especially in high-end tobacco and alcohol packaging, food packaging, and film printing. Our waterborne binders are widely recognized for their excellent color development and transferability.
challenges: Resolubility balance under high-speed printing
Adhesion to non-polar films (OPP, PET)
Strict environmental regulations on residual solvents
Visual requirements for high gloss and high transparency

solutions.title: High-end Tobacco & Alcohol Packaging Ink
solutions.desc: Provides high-resolubility, high-color-development waterborne acrylic emulsions, ensuring clear printing patterns and vibrant colors.

solutions.title: Film Printing & Inkjet
solutions.desc: Specially developed for flexible packaging and digital printing, with excellent composite strength and color development performance.

benefits: Zero solvent residue, food-grade safety compliant
Helping the packaging industry transition to green

coreAdvantages.title: High Color Development & Transfer
coreAdvantages.desc: Excellent pigment wetting, ensuring high color saturation and clear dots.

coreAdvantages.title: Excellent Resolubility
coreAdvantages.desc: No plate plugging during high-speed printing, easy to clean after shutdown, improving efficiency.

coreAdvantages.title: Multi-substrate Applicability
coreAdvantages.desc: Widely applicable to paper, PE, PET, BOPP, and other packaging materials.

home.overview: Health and aesthetics in the home environment are equally important. Seaton's waterborne wood coatings and decorative resins eliminate formaldehyde and VOC hazards while preserving the most natural texture and touch of wood.
challenges: Wood grain raising issues caused by waterborne coatings
Balance between film transparency and fullness
Resistance to water, heat, and household chemicals
Drying speed control during application

solutions.title: High-end Wood Furniture Coatings
solutions.desc: Uses unique anti-grain-raising technology, providing transparency and hardness comparable to solvent-based paints.

solutions.title: Interior Decoration & Flooring
solutions.desc: High-wear, anti-slip waterborne floor paint systems providing long-lasting protection for homes.

benefits: Odor-free and eco-friendly, ready to move in after painting
Perfectly showcases the natural beauty of wood

coreAdvantages.title: Patented Anti-Grain-Raising Tech
coreAdvantages.desc: Effectively solves wood fiber swelling caused by waterborne paint, resulting in a smooth and delicate film.

coreAdvantages.title: High Transparency & Fullness
coreAdvantages.desc: Deeply wets wood texture, presenting a clear and thick feel like solvent-based paint.

coreAdvantages.title: Rapid Drying Performance
coreAdvantages.desc: Excellent early anti-blocking property, shortening production cycles and increasing capacity.

leather.overview: Seaton provides a full set of waterborne leather finishing solutions for the fashion industry. Whether pursuing extreme softness for garment leather or durability for footwear leather, we provide precise technical support.
challenges: Preservation and modification of natural leather texture
Balance between coating softness and toughness
Excellent flex resistance and dry/wet rub performance
Implementation of fashion colors and special effects

solutions.title: Wet End Processing
solutions.desc: Provides a full set of wet-end auxiliaries from degreasing and liming to retanning and fatliquoring, optimizing basic leather quality.

solutions.title: Leather Finishing
solutions.desc: Extremely soft tactile resins and functional auxiliaries give leather a silk-like delicate texture and high gloss.

benefits: Enhancing leather grade and added value

coreAdvantages.title: Ultimate Tactile Design
coreAdvantages.desc: From silky to meaty, providing diverse surface tactile adjustment solutions.

coreAdvantages.title: Excellent Flex Resistance
coreAdvantages.desc: The film has extremely high elasticity and toughness, no cracking after tens of thousands of flex tests.

coreAdvantages.title: Environmental Compliance
coreAdvantages.desc: Fully meets ZDHC, OEKO-TEX, and other major international environmental certifications.

industrial.overview: Seaton provides a full set of water-based polymer solutions for industrial manufacturing and new energy tracks. From harsh industrial anti-corrosion environments to high-tech power battery bonding scenarios, we are committed to solving both performance and environmental challenges through molecular-level design.
challenges: Long-term ultra-strong anti-corrosion requirements for industrial substrates
Surface stability under extreme chemical environments
Electrochemical compatibility inside new energy batteries
Mechanical protection needs under high-intensity operations

solutions.title: Industrial Protection
solutions.desc: For hardware and mechanical equipment, providing fast-drying, high-adhesion, high-salt-spray-resistant waterborne anti-rust solutions.

solutions.title: Power Battery & Energy
solutions.desc: Specially developed for the new energy sector, providing binders and separator coatings with excellent electrochemical stability.

coreAdvantages.title: High-Toughness Protection System
coreAdvantages.desc: The film does not peel or crack under severe impact, providing long-term protection for equipment.

coreAdvantages.title: Excellent Anti-Corrosion Performance
coreAdvantages.desc: Passes hundreds of hours of salt spray testing, effectively blocking moisture and oxygen from corroding metal.

coreAdvantages.title: Electrochemical Stability
coreAdvantages.desc: Specially optimized functional monomers for power batteries, ensuring long life and high safety.
